name: merge-mode marks a rule absent from a fresh fetch as deprecated with deprecated_at + removed-upstream reason
command:
OUT=/tmp/cl564-o07-$$; mkdir -p $OUT && cat > $OUT/v1.md <<'MD'
# Framework

## Encrypt at rest
All data must be encrypted.

## Audit logging
Logs required.
MD
cat > $OUT/v2.md <<'MD'
# Framework

## Encrypt at rest
All data must be encrypted.
MD
cd $OUT && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-refresh.sh" --url $OUT/v1.md --target-namespace us-government --framework-id o07 --source-id o07src --authoritative-publisher X --out-dir $OUT/out 2>/dev/null; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-refresh.sh" --url $OUT/v2.md --target-namespace us-government --framework-id o07 --source-id o07src --authoritative-publisher X --out-dir $OUT/out 2>e.err; grep -q 'deprecated=1' e.err && grep -q 'deprecated_reason: removed-upstream' $OUT/out/us-government/o07.yaml && echo merge-marks-removed-deprecated 1>&2; rm -rf $OUT
